title: RFTools Power
description: RFTools addon for all power generator/storage
body:
# RFTools Power

This mod is an addon for the RFTools mods which contains several power storage and power generator solutions. For power generation there is the simple coal generator, the blazing generator (from blazerods) and the endergenic (from enderpearls). There is a multi dimensional power storage system and also a multiblock power storage system that can store a lot of power.

This mod adds the following power generation and storage options:
- A simple generator from coal or charcoal
- A generator from blaze rods
- A generator from ender pearls (endergenic)
- A dimensional powercell which can store and transfer power across great distances (and other dimensions)
- A power storage multiblock for more power storage


![RFTools Power blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YWbLuPa1/images/4626df831d504396ff30cfe229ea6629d8bc7d7f.png)

**Note!** This mod does require RFTools Base.

# Modpacks
Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.
